trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2026 test recommends Barilla and Garofalo as top pasta brands based on quality, texture and price.
